revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ichinomiya-jinja (Tokushima)]][[en:Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima)]][[ja:一宮神社 (徳島市)]][[simple:Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima)]][[zh:一宮神社 (德島市)]] {{Expand Japanese|一宮神社 (徳島市)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima) | native_name = 一宮神社 | image = Ichinomiya Shrine, Tokushima 03.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima) | coordinates = {{coord|34.03780555555556|134.46263888888888}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ichinomiya Shrine'''|一宮神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|religious building|lt=religious building|de|Sakralbau|nn|Sakralbygg|no|Sakralbygg|sk|Sakrálna stavba|tok|tomo pi nasin Shrine|qid=Q135041341|1=Hihameno- Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041351|ltq=Q135041351|qid=Q135041351|1=Ama-no-iwato-wake-toyotamahimeno Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity Tokushima|sc|Tokushima|sh|Tokushima|simple|Tokushima (city)|sr|Токушима|sv|Tokushima|sw|Tokushima, Tokushima|szl|Tokushima|tg|Токушима|th|โทกูชิมะ (เมือง)|tl|Lungsod ng (syudad)|wuu|德岛市|zh_classical|德島市|zh_min_nan|Tokusima-chhī|zh_yue|德島市|zh|德島市|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} * {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q3205778|ltq=Q3205778|qid=Q3205778|1=Nakata district}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.03780555555556|134.46263888888888}} == image (P18) == * Ichinomiya Shrine, Tokushima 03.jpg == described by source (P1343) == * {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|qid=Q135037878|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)}} ** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20090614151337/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/540101.html == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183197 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q90139226|ltq=Q90139226|qid=Q90139226|1=Ken-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == P14005 (P14005) == * {{ill|Q11545368|ltq=Q11545368|qid=Q11545368|1=Senior Eighth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11071125|ltq=Q11071125|qid=Q11071125|1=Junior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11123280|ltq=Q11123280|qid=Q11123280|1=Senior Fifth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11071127|ltq=Q11071127|qid=Q11071127|1=Junior Fourth Rank}} * {{ill|Q11123338|ltq=Q11123338|qid=Q11123338|1=Senior Fourth Rank}} == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Q210684|ltq=Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * -ヤクラヒメノEngishiki Jinmyōchō == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 2480005000904 == Commons category (P373) == * Ichinomiya-jinja (Tokushima) == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135041343|ltq=Q135041343|qid=Q135041343|1=Iwatowakeyakurahimeno Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市一宮町西丁237', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県徳島市国府町矢野', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Ichinomiya-jinja (Tokushima)}} [[EN:Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima)]] [[JA:一宮神社 (徳島市)]] [[SIMPLE:Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima)]] [[ZH:一宮神社 (德島市)]] {{wikidata link|Q11352598}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2024年10月}} {{神社 |名称 = Ichinomiya Shrine |画像 = [[File:Ichinomiya Shrine, Tokushima 03.jpg|270px]] |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya-chō (Tokushima)|Q11352592|qid=Q11352592|lt=Ichinomiya-chō|1=Ichinomiya-chō}} Nishi-chō 237 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|34|2|16.1|N|134|27|45.5|E|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Ōgetsu-hime-no-Mikoto
Ama-no-Iwato-wake-Yakura-hime-no-Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} (major) {{ill|lt=candidate shrine|Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
{{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q1656379|qid=Q1656379|1=Ichinomiya}} candidate shrine
former {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} |創建 = |本殿 = {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |例祭 = {{ill|lt=October 18|Q2964|qid=Q2964|1=October 18}} |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Ichinomiya Shrine|position=left|width=200|float=center|caption=|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20}}{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=10|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Ichinomiya Shrine''' (いちのみやじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya-chō (Tokushima)|Q11352592|qid=Q11352592|lt=Ichinomiya-chō|1=Ichinomiya-chō}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is one of the candidate shrines for "Ama-no-Iwato-wake-Yakura-hime Shrine," the {{ill|lt=Shikinaisha major shrine|Q134917288|qid=Q134917288|1=Shikinai Taisha}} and {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya|Q1656379|qid=Q1656379|1=Ichinomiya}} of {{ill|lt=Awa Province|Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}}Other candidate shrines are {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Yakura-hime Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}} and {{ill|lt=Kamiichinomiya Ōawa Shrine|Q11358379|qid=Q11358379|1=Kamiichinomiya Ōawa Shrine}}.. Under the former {{ill|lt=modern shrine ranking system|Q712534|qid=Q712534|lt=shrine ranking system|1=Modern system of ranked Shinto shrines}}, it was a {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Prefectural Shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. It is selected as a {{ill|lt=Tokushima Civic Heritage|Q11273094|qid=Q11273094|1=Tokushima Civic Heritage}} site. === Overview === It enshrines {{ill|lt=Ōgetsu-hime|Q3261482|qid=Q3261482|lt=Ōgetsu-hime-no-Mikoto|1=Ōgetsuhime}} and Ama-no-Iwato-wake-Yakura-hime-no-Mikoto. The shrine is in western Tokushima City, and the surrounding area is called "Ichinomiya-chō." On the summit of the mountain to the east once stood {{ill|lt=Ichinomiya Castle (Awa Province)|Q11266820|qid=Q11266820|lt=Ichinomiya Castle|1=Ichinomiya Castle}} of the {{ill|lt=Ogasawara clan|Q2975340|qid=Q2975340|1=Ogasawara clan}}. Originally, {{ill|lt=Kamiichinomiya Ōawa Shrine|Q11358379|qid=Q11358379|1=Kamiichinomiya Ōawa Shrine}} (in {{ill|lt=Myōzai District|Q1155732|qid=Q1155732|1=Myōzai District, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Kamyama|Q1350922|qid=Q1350922|1=Kamiyama, Tokushima}}) was the ichinomiya of Awa Province, but because worship there was inconvenient, it is said that a branch shrine was established near the provincial office in the late Heian period, and this shrine became the ichinomiya. Later, because Ichinomiya Castle stood nearby, the area including this shrine became a main battleground during the Tenshō campaigns of the Sengoku period and was burned over. In the early Edo period, however, the third lord of Awa Domain, Hachisuka Mitsutaka, quickly restored it, and by 1653 the pilgrim Sūzen wrote in his book that "the haiden is three bays to each side and the halls are splendidly built." Across the road in front of the shrine stands {{ill|lt=Dainichi-ji (Tokushima)|Q11435622|qid=Q11435622|lt=Dainichi-ji|1=Dainichi-ji (Tokushima)}}, Temple No. 13 of the {{ill|lt=Shikoku 88-temple pilgrimage|Q1972399|qid=Q1972399|1=Shikoku Pilgrimage}}. Before the early Meiji separation of Shinto and Buddhism, this shrine itself was the pilgrimage site, while Dainichi-ji was the bettō temple and served as the nōkyō office. There are also traces that nōkyō entries were made here under "Ichinomiya Daimyōjin, honji-butsu Jūichimen Kannon, Daigūji." After the early Meiji separation, the shrine's honji image of Jūichimen Kannon was moved to Dainichi-ji's main hall as principal image, the pilgrimage site was transferred, and the bettō relationship ended. === Precincts === * Honden and haiden * Precinct shrines (hokora) ** Wakaba Shrine: enshrines the heroic spirits of 238 war dead. ** Sarutahiko Shrine ** Tenjin Shrine ** Ōnamuchi Shrine and Kotoshironushi Shrine ** Munakata Shrine ** Wakamiya Shrine: enshrines successive castle lords. ** Shūsai Shrine: a shrine where parishioners gather and converse Itinomiya20210831 2.jpg|Taiko bridge (Taishō 3) Ichinomiya Shrine 31 August 2021 1.jpg|Front view Ichinomiya Shrine, Tokushima 10.jpg|Torii Ichinomiya Shrine 31 August 2021 3.jpg|Haiden Ichinomiya Shrine 10 September 2024 1.jpg|Honden (Important Cultural Property) Ichinomiya Shrine 10 September 2024 2.jpg|{{ill|lt=Chijin-tō|Q65643555|qid=Q65643555|1=Jijin-tō}} and precinct shrine Ichinomiya Shrine 10 September 2024 3.jpg|Precinct shrine === Cultural properties === [[File:Ichinomiya Shrine 22 July 2023 2.jpg|thumb|Honden]] ; Important Cultural Property (national designation) * Honden (with 9 munafuda plaques) - built in Kan'ei 7 (1630). Three-bay nagare-zukuri with front chidori-hafu, copper-sheet roofing. The one-bay kōhai is in karahafu style, with richly colored carvings at key points. Designated 1993-04-20. === Footnotes === {{reflist}} === Local information === ; Location * {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}{{ill|lt=Ichinomiya-chō (Tokushima)|Q11352592|qid=Q11352592|lt=Ichinomiya-chō|1=Ichinomiya-chō}} Nishi-chō 237 === Related items === {{commonscat|Ichinomiya-jinja (Tokushima)}} ; Shrines claiming to be ichinomiya of Awa Province * {{ill|lt=Ama-no-Iwato-wake-Yakura-hime Shrine|Q11390577|qid=Q11390577|1=Yakurahime Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Kamiichinomiya Ōawa Shrine|Q11358379|qid=Q11358379|1=Kamiichinomiya Ōawa Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Ōasahiko Shrine|Q723417|qid=Q723417|1=Ōasahiko Shrine}} ; Shrines claiming to be ninomiya of Awa Province * {{ill|lt=Ninomiya Hachiman Shrine|Q106852484|qid=Q106852484|1=Ninomiya Hachinan Shrine}} ; Shrines claiming to be ichinomiya of Tosa Province * {{ill|lt=Tosa Shrine|Q704890|qid=Q704890|1=Tosa Shrine}} ; Shrines claiming to be ninomiya of Tosa Province * {{ill|lt=Omura Shrine|Q63471|qid=Q63471|1=Omura Shrine}} * {{ill|lt=Asakura Shrine (Kochi)|Q11517328|qid=Q11517328|lt=Asakura Shrine|1=Asakura Shrine (Kōchi)}} ; Shrines claiming to be ichinomiya of Iyo Province * {{ill|lt=Ōyamazumi Shrine|Q703904|qid=Q703904|1=Ōyamazumi Shrine}} ; Shrines claiming to be ninomiya of Iyo Province : None ; Shrines claiming to be ichinomiya of Sanuki Province * {{ill|lt=Tamura Shrine (Takamatsu)|Q11576978|qid=Q11576978|lt=Tamura Shrine|1=Tamura Shrine}} ; Shrines claiming to be ninomiya of Sanuki Province * {{ill|lt=Ōmizukami Shrine|Q11436783|qid=Q11436783|1=Oominakami Shrine}} {{神道 横}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ichinomiya Shrine (Tokushima)]][[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shrines receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:Shikinai Taisha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Ichinomiya]] [[Category:徳島県の旧県社]] [[Category:徳島市の重要文化財]] [[Category:Cultural heritage monuments in Japan]] [[Category:江戸時代の建築]] [[Category:Awa Province (Tokushima)]]
